name: OptiLLM
description: OpenAI-compatible optimizing inference proxy for user-owned local/API model workflows. Adds reasoning-time techniques such as best-of-N, self-consistency, MCTS, mixture-of-agents, routing, privacy, memory, MCP client support, and multi-provider failover without model training.
capabilities: Run an OpenAI-compatible proxy in front of user-owned models
Improve reasoning with inference-time search plus voting plus reflection plus multi-agent methods
Route across multiple model providers through LiteLLM-compatible configuration
Add privacy plus memory plus MCP client plus web-search plus code-execution plus structured-output plugins
Let ctx recommend skills plus agents plus MCP servers while OptiLLM handles model-call optimization
